purpose: Seed controlled business cases for CASULO internal calibration.

cases.title: Scattered data and rework
cases.message: Company with data spread across spreadsheets, separate financial system, inconsistent customer service, rework and no reliable indicators.

cases.title: Critical systems with unmapped integrations
cases.message: Medium company with critical systems, poorly mapped integrations, manual changes and no formal rollback.

cases.title: Multi-channel service without operational state
cases.message: Company with multi-channel service, inconsistent records, no process owner and decisions based on informal memory.

cases.title: Owner-managed business with informal controls
cases.message: Small business controlled by owner memory, suppliers in messages, stock in spreadsheet and no computable operational state.

cases.title: Department with dashboards but no state governance
cases.message: Department has dashboards and reports, but no gate, no evidence boundary, no clear owner and no action trace.
